resources.string:
"Friends Location Tracking App
Version 1.1

A simple app to track friends' locations in real-time using the Matrix protocol."

"How to use:
1. Configure your Matrix Credentials.
2. Add your groups in the Groups/Rooms section and select one as active.
3. Grant location permissions.
4. Your location will be shared in the active room, and friends\' locations will appear on the map."
This app needs location permissions to track your movement and display your position on the map.
